ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the country belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital of the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  "gini_coefficient" REAL /* Gini coefficient of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent the region belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "happiness_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the score belongs to */,
  "score" REAL /* Happiness score for the country */,
  "whisker_high" REAL /* Upper whisker for the happiness score */,
  "whisker_low" REAL /* Lower whisker for the happiness score */,
  "dystopia" REAL /* Dystopia score for the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the score was measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_happiness_scores_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gdp_per_capita" (
  "gdp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GDP entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the GDP belongs to */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP per capita for the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the GDP was measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gdp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gdp_per_capita_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_support" (
  "support_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social support entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the social support belongs to */,
  "support" REAL /* Social support score for the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the social support was measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("support_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_support_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthy_life_expectancy" (
  "expectancy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthy life expectancy entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the healthy life expectancy belongs to */,
  "expectancy" REAL /* Healthy life expectancy score for the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the healthy life expectancy was measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expectancy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_healthy_life_expectancy_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "freedom_to_make_life_choices" (
  "freedom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each freedom to make life choices entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the freedom to make life choices belongs to */,
  "freedom" REAL /* Freedom to make life choices score for the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the freedom to make life choices was measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("freedom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_freedom_to_make_life_choices_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "generosity" (
  "generosity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each generosity entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the generosity belongs to */,
  "generosity" REAL /* Generosity score for the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the generosity was measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("generosity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_generosity_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "perceptions_of_corruption" (
  "corruption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each perceptions of corruption entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the perceptions of corruption belongs to */,
  "corruption" REAL /* Perceptions of corruption score for the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the perceptions of corruption was measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("corruption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_perceptions_of_corruption_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "publication_name" TEXT /* Name of the publication */,
  "publication_type" TEXT /* Type of the publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* DOI of the publication */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who published the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection */,
  "collection_name" TEXT /* Name of the data collection */,
  "collection_type" TEXT /* Type of the data collection */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source used in the collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collections_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)
